results.title: Ardbeg Traigh Bhan 19 Years Old Batch 2 Single Malt Scotch Whisky

results.description: 46.2% ABV - Islay, Scotland Nose: Begins with malted grain and spices, orange-lime citrus, and tropical fruit atop a sweet, heavy peat smoke.
